ItacAcademyItem.Name: Olimpici (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Books related to the history of the Olimpici Academy, but not in British Library holdings, include: Olympici Academici Marcello Bosio (Ferrara 1568?).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
